semantic.role: TypeScript type definition module for LLM configuration command structures and view models within the view service layer.
responsibilities: Defines interfaces for LLM command targets, setup values, and status view models used by CLI commands and runtime services.
Provides type aliases for LLM configuration and secrets store subsets to enforce type safety across the LLM configuration boundary.
Encapsulates type definitions that facilitate communication between view services and infrastructure modules for LLM settings.
outOfScope: Orchestrating runtime LLM operations or service logic.
Direct interaction with LLM APIs or secret management.
Rendering UI components or handling HTTP requests.
invariants: Pure type definitions with no executable code.
Depends on infrastructure types (Config, Secrets, GlobalLLMConfig) and runtime service types.
Exclusively used by view services and CLI for LLM configuration typing.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a strongly-typed contract for LLM configuration commands and view models, decoupling view service logic from infrastructure details.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of refactoring to slim LLM and service boundary, likely consolidating type definitions for clearer separation.
